name: Cottage Cheese (Helen's Smierkase)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour one quart of heated sour milk into a cheesecloth bag.
2. Pour one quart of warm water over the mixture and allow it to drain through.
3. Repeat the draining process twice.
4. Tie the cheesecloth bag and let it drip until all the whey is gone.
5. Serve with either sweet or sour cream and seasoning to taste.
Source: Pennsylvania Dutch Cook Book - Fine Old Recipes, Culinary Arts Press, 1936.
